{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-04.
8,995 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-03 -> 2026-03-04)

- "Who will Donald Trump name to replace Kristi Noem as US homeland security secretary by March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Tom Homan: 0.30, Stephen Miller: 0.10, Rodney Scott: 0.05, Todd Lyons: 0.05, Tricia McLaughlin: 0.04} | Truth: Markwayne Mullin
  Brier: -0.11 | TW-Score: -10.66
- "What coalition will Donald Trump announce to fight drug cartels at a South Florida summit by March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Alliance of the Americas: 0.06, Americas First Coalition: 0.05, Coalition of the Americas: 0.05, Western Hemisphere Alliance: 0.04} | Truth: Americas Counter-Cartel Coalition
  Brier: -0.01 | TW-Score: -1.02
- "Which capital city will see homes near the US Embassy ordered evacuated during the regional conflict by 6th March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Doha: 0.20, Manama: 0.20, Kuwait City: 0.15, Abu Dhabi: 0.10, Baghdad: 0.10} | Truth: Doha
  Brier: +0.28 | TW-Score: +27.75
- "What Saudi city will authorities say was hit by a deadly military projectile by March 8, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Dammam: 0.18, Khobar: 0.15, Riyadh: 0.12, Jubail: 0.10, Dhahran: 0.08} | Truth: Al-Kharj
  Brier: -0.09 | TW-Score: -8.57
- "Which Gulf country will report that an Iranian missile hit a state-run oil refinery by March 6, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Saudi Arabia: 0.30, Bahrain: 0.20, Kuwait: 0.15, Qatar: 0.08, United Arab Emirates: 0.08} | Truth: Bahrain
  Brier: +0.23 | TW-Score: +23.47
- "Alongside Jeff Merkley, who will co-introduce, by March 2026, a US Senate bill to stop top federal officials from trading on prediction markets?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Elizabeth Warren: 0.15, Chris Van Hollen: 0.10, Sheldon Whitehouse: 0.10, Richard Blumenthal: 0.08, Ron Wyden: 0.05} | Truth: Amy Klobuchar
  Brier: -0.05 | TW-Score: -5.14
- "Which military will a preliminary US Department of Defense investigation identify as responsible for the deadly school strike in southern Iran by 11 March 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Israeli military: 0.35, US military: 0.30, Iranian military: 0.12} | Truth: US military
  Brier: +0.37 | TW-Score: +37.31
- "What town southwest of Tehran will Iranian state media identify as the place where two schools were hit by missiles by March 31, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Islamshahr: 0.12, Shahriar: 0.10, Robat Karim: 0.08, Malard: 0.06, Shahr-e Rey: 0.05} | Truth: Parand
  Brier: -0.04 | TW-Score: -3.69

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 330 (239 resolved, 91 active)
- accuracy: 22.4% | brier skill score: 0.122 | time weighted score: 3789.61
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
